project-stage.name: MVP implemented, now in hardening and operational cleanup
project-stage.summary: Продукт уже содержит работающие backend/frontend/admin/bot/deploy контуры, но пока находится не в фазе greenfield implementation, а в фазе stabilization: security, deploy, migration discipline, AI handoff and consistency.

what-is-working.item: Backend domain structure and API surface exist.
User frontend builds successfully in current local environment.
Admin frontend code exists as separate app.
VPN service supports route-aware logic with legacy compatibility.
Admin route-policy controls and migration-safe routing analytics are implemented.
Billing, referrals and Telegram bot are implemented at code level.

Release v2.4.27 is published and includes device-bound access control, per-plan device limits, detect-first handshake anomaly detection, admin peer control, a live Postgres handshake-timestamp hotfix, API exposure of plan device_limit, and the earlier backend-driven manual provisioning plus live awg0 peer activation.
RU and DE AWG interfaces are now managed through systemd and survive service restarts cleanly.
DE host successfully rebooted into kernel 6.8.0-106-generic and AWG recovered automatically after boot.
Fresh RU and DE servers were deployed and validated on March 26, 2026 with live AWG tunnel handshake and healthy backend/frontend/admin HTTPS surfaces on RU.
Manual internal client issuance through deploy/create-client.sh now produces configs through backend CLI and applies peers to live awg0 state on RU.
New RU host-level awg0 config watcher automatically syncs peer changes from backend-driven provisioning, so both manual and web-issued clients become active without manual awg commands.

Release v2.11.0-awg-obfuscation-stable was deployed from GitHub main and operator-validated on RU/DE VPS with AWG stealth obfuscation, profile parity, RU-DE handshake, new client handshake, DE egress, and upgrade preservation.

Phase-19 anti-ping-pong abuse detection is implemented locally: observe-mode roaming tolerance, Redis-backed endpoint history, soft auto-rotation path, admin anti-abuse context, and V-M-031 verification passed on 2026-04-20.

Phase-20 configurable VPN subnets and 1000-device capacity is live-tested: release v2.13.0-vpn-network-capacity-stable deployed successfully on VPS, fresh deploy defaults use 172.29.0.0/22 for clients and 172.29.255.0/30 for RU/DE relay, capacity validation rejects /24 for 1000 devices, and address-pool migration requires VPN_NETWORK_ROTATE=1.
Phase-23 compact mobile user cabinet passed local build and Chrome CDP mobile smoke for dashboard, config, and subscription routes.
Phase-24 compact mobile admin console passed local build and Chrome/CDP mobile smoke for overview, users, devices, and analytics with confirmation-safe device actions.
Phase-25 session-security gates passed locally: static auth guard, admin refresh-token lifecycle cleanup, and token blacklist unit tests.
Phase-26 stabilization handoff records local evidence, protected deploy/install surfaces, and live-required recovery blockers.
Release v2.14.0-stabilization-stable was operator-deployed from local PC to clean VPS servers and manually validated as working on 2026-05-12.

Phase-27 email verification foundation passed local verification on 2026-05-13: provider-neutral email delivery, pending registration, HMAC token storage, domain guards, replay/expiry checks, and no /register cutover.

Phase-28 verified registration cutover is locally closed as of 2026-05-19: /register is pending-only, /verify-email activates user access once, trial/VPN/referral side effects are delayed until email proof, frontend check-email/verify states build, and the former V-M-004/V-M-022 route/API debt was resolved by aligning stale tests to canonical /api/v1 prefixes.

Phase-29 MTProto provisioning core passed local verification on 2026-05-14: restore-safe assignment registry, Alembic migration metadata, deterministic SNI, KPprotoN-compatible fake-TLS secret vector, tg://proxy assembly, verified-user guard, idempotent reuse, and explicit reissue policy.

Phase-30 KPprotoN runtime bridge passed local verification on 2026-05-14: fake/local adapter boundary, startup replay, degraded bridge semantics, secret-free runtime health, MTProto scheduler reconciliation, and no deploy/install changes.

Phase-31 MTProto user cabinet UX passed local verification on 2026-05-14: owner-only /api/v1/mtproto/proxy endpoint, compact dashboard proxy card, Telegram open/copy actions, safe unverified/pending/reissue states, frontend build, static mobile/API smoke, and no deploy/install changes.

Phase-32 domain TLS edge passed local/static verification on 2026-05-14: krotpn.xyz settings, HTTP to HTTPS redirect contract, wildcard HTTPS fallback, compose config, protected deploy/install guard, rollback/live-smoke checklist, and M-044/M-043/M-040 regression tests.

Phase-33 MTProto admin ops passed local verification on 2026-05-14: admin-only redacted assignment list/detail/health, confirmation-safe reissue/revoke with runtime SNI policy removal, safe audit events, compact frontend-admin /mtproto page, backend regression tests, frontend build, static smoke, and no deploy/install changes.
Phase-34 MTProto integration stabilization passed local verification on 2026-05-14 and its production DNS/TLS/shared-443 Telegram smoke is now closed by Phase-41 live evidence.

Phase-35 operator wildcard TLS installer passed local/static verification on 2026-05-17 and clean VPS production validation on 2026-05-19: install.sh asks for domain/fullchain1.pem/privkey1.pem paths, deploy validates operator wildcard TLS material before compose startup, production self-signed fallback is blocked unless dev mode is explicit, and nginx can use an ignored runtime domain config.

Phase-35 reviewer follow-up on 2026-05-17 fixed clean VPS preflight risk by bootstrapping openssl on RU when needed, rejecting certificate source paths under /opt/KrotPN, and strengthening Phase-35 smoke with dynamic installer validator checks.

Phase-35 live clean VPS deploy revealed backend startup failure from blank MTProto secrets; 2026-05-17 hotfix generates MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX and MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT during deploy and treats blank optional MTProto env values as safely unset.

Phase-36 Resend deploy email-provider wiring passed local execution on 2026-05-17 and later clean-deploy registration proof: install.sh asks for a redacted Resend API key and noreply@krotpn.xyz sender, deploy writes EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend/RESEND_API_KEY/RESEND_API_URL/EMAIL_FROM into .env, local smoke verifies request shape/provider_disabled guards/secret redaction, and operator registration via email succeeds on VPS.

Phase-37 live MTProto shared-443 fix is implemented locally on 2026-05-18: mtproto-runtime is added as a host-network edge service, backend has a token-protected HTTP policy adapter, provisioning applies SNI policy before returning active payloads, nginx HTTPS fallback moves to 8443, deploy generates runtime policy-token/env wiring, and deploy persists Telegram upstream routes through awg-client.

Phase-38 DE-backed MTProto edge is historical partial-live on 2026-05-18: RU public 443 is HAProxy SNI router, HTTPS reaches private RU nginx fallback on 9443, public admin remains on 8443, DE runtime listens on 443, private policy health is OK, and HAProxy reports the DE MTProto backend UP. Its remaining Telegram proof gap is superseded by Phase-41.

Phase-39 MTProto availability closure is historical partial-live on 2026-05-18: local/static smoke, 34 backend MTProto regression tests, frontend build, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed; redacted live smoke proved active assignment, healthy policy_count, public RU:443 route, validated fake-TLS accept, private DE fallback 9443, and reachable Telegram downstream. Its remaining client proof gap is superseded by Phase-41.

Phase-40 official MTProxy data-plane and individual user secrets passed local execution on 2026-05-19: official-mtproxy runtime scaffold, Phase-40 RU HTTPS-vs-MTProxy routing, per-user dd-secret owner payloads, redacted secret manifest sync, admin revoke/reissue sync, deploy wiring, and 49 targeted regression/static tests pass. The official MTProxy production path is superseded by Phase-41.

Phase-40 live MTProxy stability hotfix on 2026-05-19 fixed repeated identical manifest apply restarts: DE official mtproto-proxy keeps running across scheduler/apply cycles, exposes private HTTP stats, uses DE NAT info, and live policy health is healthy. The path remains rollback/reference only after Phase-41.

Phase-41 KPprotoN fake-TLS production data-plane rollback passed local and live verification on 2026-05-19: official MTProxy is superseded for production, owner payloads return to per-user u-*.krotpn.xyz with ee fake-TLS links, provisioning/admin/scheduler use KPprotoN runtime bridge again, deploy selects the DE KPprotoN runtime plus RU SNI router, and local backend/static/Erlang/compose verification passed.

Phase-41 live MTProto fix on 2026-05-19 found two blockers: the old seriyps/mtproto_proxy lock and a blank proxy ad tag. mtproto-runtime now pins upstream commit 154a8fb, deploy defaults MTPROTO_AD_TAG to 32 zero hex chars, active assignment replay succeeded, issued-link mtp_ping passed through RU SNI router to DE KPprotoN runtime on DC +1 through +5, and operator clean-deploy testing confirmed both VPN and Telegram Desktop/mobile MTProto proxy work.

Legacy V-M-029 Phase-16 rebranding verification is closed as superseded by V-M-012/Phase-41 as of 2026-05-19; current deploy-surface gates passed locally and Phase-41 clean-deploy live proof is the active release evidence.

Phase-42 MTProto usage analytics and promotion tag control passed local execution on 2026-05-19 and operator clean-deploy validation on 2026-05-23: metadata-only usage storage, mtproto_proxy metric backend, active-SNI sampler, private runtime telemetry snapshot/drain, backend ingestion, analytics service, admin API, compact admin UI, observe-only abuse signals, and masked @MTProxyBot promotion tag control are implemented; the operator confirmed registration via @MTProxybot, MTPROTO_AD_TAG restart application, and applied status.

Phase-43 MTProto admin analytics UX, abuse alerts, and 90-day IP observability passed local execution on 2026-05-20: encrypted admin-only IP history, user/proxy search and detail, current/last/all IP views, timeseries graphs, CPU/RAM runtime metrics, abuse alert inbox, acknowledge/resolve/disable/block actions, storage-budget retention jobs, compact frontend-admin UI, backend tests, frontend build, Erlang compile, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and Phase-43 static smoke passed.

Phase-43 live-feedback fix on 2026-05-20 passed local verification: MTProto runtime now emits tls_domain/client_ipv4 ip_observation events, backend stores current/last IP without inflating usage counters, abuse alerts require hard multi-IP/concurrency evidence, and admin MTProto UI adds paginated large-list navigation plus compact area graphs.

MTProto reboot hotfix on 2026-05-23 diagnosed DE awg0 missing after host reboot, enabled awg-quick@awg0 live, restored private policy health, replayed both active user SNI assignments, and added local deploy/runtime/UI regression guards.

MTProto/VPN reboot resilience fix on 2026-05-23 diagnosed false-green panels after reboot: RU lost transient vpnclients route table/NAT, DE lost NAT, and DE mtproto_proxy had no_pool,2 from incomplete Telegram downstream bootstrap. Live hotfix restored routing/NAT and policy replay; the current RU/DE hosts now have enabled/active krotpn-vpn-runtime.service, DE runtime was rebuilt, and redacted live smoke passed fake-TLS accept plus Telegram downstream reachability.

Operator clean-deploy and reboot validation on 2026-05-24 confirmed that after the normal startup delay the website, admin panel, VPN, and issued KPprotoN MTProto proxies recover and work after both RU and DE hosts restart.

MTProto admin UI fix on 2026-05-23 passed local verification: visible technical Signals panel/count was removed from the Abuse screen while alert APIs stay wired, and open alert actions now expose Russian hover descriptions for review, acknowledge, resolve, disable, and IP-block decisions.

MTProto admin IP history UI fix on 2026-05-23 passed local verification: the investigation drawer no longer renders visible CIDR network masks, and the IP history list is more compact with internal mouse scrolling for long address history.

Release target v2.28.0-device-config-master-detail-stable is the current stable baseline for GitHub main/Releases after Phase-71: read-only per-device VPN config retrieval API, selected-device QR/.conf/Copy exports, compact master-detail device UX for up to 9 devices, secondary confirmation-safe rotate/delete controls, frameless user-cabinet logo, subscription boundary pulse, and user-cabinet i18n/copy cleanup. The v2.27.0 user-cabinet QR baseline remains included, and earlier Phase-41 plus reboot-resilience live evidence remains the active production VPN/MTProto runtime baseline.

Phase-44 email onboarding UX and password recovery passed local execution on 2026-06-01: branded verification/reset email templates, spam-folder guidance, removal of stale trial/VPN registration copy, strong-password enforcement, one-time password reset tokens, duplicate-email recovery CTA, frontend build, backend auth/email/migration tests, and Phase-44 static smoke passed without deploy/install changes.

Phase-45 first-VPN-handshake trial activation passed local execution on 2026-06-01: default trial duration is four days, verified users receive pending VPN trial access, first config remains available, first observed VPN handshake starts the countdown exactly once, subscription API returns server-side days/hours/minutes and active date range, dashboard/subscription UI show pending/countdown/calendar states, backend suite passed 35/35, frontend build and Phase-45 smoke passed, and deploy/install scripts were untouched.

Phase-46 user cabinet password and MTProto link UX polish passed local execution on 2026-06-01: registration shows a safe password format example, Telegram proxy actions separate tg:// app link from https://t.me browser link, MTProto labels are Russian, status refresh is bounded at 30 seconds, frontend build and Phase-46 smoke passed, and deploy/install scripts were untouched.

Phase-47 MTProto CTA subdomain link generation passed local execution and hotfixes on 2026-06-01: new verified users receive CTA-prefixed one-label MTProto hostnames such as krot-vpn-xxxx.krotpn.xyz, numeric user IDs are hashed into 4-hex public suffixes, explicit prefixes are allow-listed, fake-TLS secrets bind to the final CTA SNI, active legacy u-* assignments are preserved, and the RU HAProxy SNI ACL now routes legacy u-12hex, existing CTA-prefix-7hex, and new CTA-prefix-4hex issued hostnames to the DE KPprotoN runtime. Local Phase-38/41/47 smoke and targeted backend tests passed; install.sh, deploy scripts, nginx, docker-compose, TLS issuance, and runtime topology were untouched.

Phase-48 VPN config download MIME and filename hardening passed local execution on 2026-06-01: /api/v1/vpn/config/download now returns application/octet-stream attachment responses with filename and filename-star .conf metadata, nosniff and no-store/private headers, config body bytes are preserved, frontend-created config Blobs use application/octet-stream, backend tests passed 10/10, frontend build and Phase-48 static smoke passed, and deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose surfaces were untouched.

Phase-49 BIMI sender branding asset deployment passed local execution on 2026-06-02: the KrotPN BIMI SVG is normalized for Tiny P/S, served from frontend/public/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg, frontend nginx allows the BIMI well-known path before hidden-file denial, README documents default._bimi DNS, frontend build copies the SVG unchanged into dist, Phase-49 smoke passed, and protected deploy/install surfaces were untouched.

Phase-50 three paid tariffs passed local execution on 2026-06-02: backend now converges the canonical 30-day KrotPN 1/6/9 tariff matrix at 369/693/936 RUB, checkout accepts plan_id only and derives YooKassa amount/metadata server-side, incompatible lower-limit checkout is blocked before payment creation, paid webhook cancels pending trial and updates subscription/device limits, user subscription UI shows compact device-aware tariff cards, admin Plans shows a protected canonical matrix without accidental CRUD controls, backend tests passed 29/29, frontend/admin builds and Phase-50 smoke passed, and protected deploy/install surfaces were untouched.

Phase-51 favicon and Resend email-logo branding passed local execution on 2026-06-02: user and admin frontend builds now include real favicon.ico plus PNG fallbacks, the user PWA includes apple/PWA icon assets, verification/reset HTML emails render the public logo at /brand/email-logo.png from FRONTEND_URL, backend email tests passed 5/5, Phase-51 source and dist smoke passed, XML/MyGRACE/diff gates passed, and protected deploy/install surfaces were untouched.

Phase-52 KrotPN Matrix visual system foundation passed local execution on 2026-06-03: user and admin route trees now mount a shared VisualShell with fixed pointer-safe Matrix canvas, scanline overlay, vignette, Matrix palette tokens, focus-visible rules, and reduced-motion policy; Phase-52 smoke, user/admin builds, Chrome mobile/desktop/reduced-motion screenshot audit, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install guards passed.

Phase-55 premium Matrix art direction passed local execution on 2026-06-03: user/admin shared CSS now has premium palette, type, density, shadow, focus, and logo tokens; decorative radial/orb shell backgrounds were removed; Phase-55 smoke validates balanced colors, compact density, logo assets, reduced-motion, screenshot PNG artifacts, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install guards.

Phase-56 premium public site and auth passed local execution on 2026-06-03: the public / route now shows a compact premium KrotPN landing with registration/login CTA, truthful VPN/free MTProto/email-proof copy, visible logo, and canonical three-plan tariff preview; authenticated user cabinet routes moved under /dashboard with legacy redirects; login/register/forgot/reset/verify routes keep compact Matrix forms with logo; frontend build, Phase-56 smoke, Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regressions, Chrome screenshot matrix, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install guard passed.

Phase-57 premium user cabinet passed local execution on 2026-06-03: protected /dashboard routes now have a compact premium command center, direct /dashboard/* primary actions, dense VPN/subscription/MTProto/device first-screen strip, compact QR/download/copy/device config workflow, server-derived subscription countdown/calendar, canonical tariff plan_id-only CTA guard, compact referrals/settings surfaces, Phase-57 smoke, frontend build, Phase-45/46/48/50/52/53/55/56 regression smokes, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

Phase-58 premium admin cockpit passed local execution on 2026-06-04: frontend-admin layout, StatCard, dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, MTProto analytics, analytics, servers, plans, and shared admin CSS now expose a compact premium operator command center, dense signal strips, bounded inventories, MTProto redaction proof, confirmation guards, canonical tariff readonly guard, analytics readonly frames, reduced-motion markers, and protected-surface isolation; frontend-admin build, Phase-58 smoke, Phase-42/43/50/52/54/55 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/frontend-user guard passed.

Phase-59 Matrix motion and microinteractions passed local execution on 2026-06-04: user/admin VisualShell and MatrixBackground now expose route-motion, reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, focus, and inactive-tab lifecycle markers; user dashboard/config/referrals and admin devices/MTProto/MTProto analytics have compact copy/download/status/feedback motion classes; frontend/admin builds, Phase-59 smoke, Phase-52/55/56/57 regressions, git diff --check, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, protected backend/deploy/runtime guard, and post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed.

Phase-60 premium frontend QA gates passed local execution on 2026-06-04: scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs now enforces public/auth/protected-user/admin/reduced-motion route matrix proof, no-overlap and responsive static gates, reduced-motion/accessibility markers, real dist bundle budgets, Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard. Lighthouse/Web Vitals live-preview proof is explicitly recorded as unavailable locally, not claimed as passed.

Phase-61 tablet and mobile adaptation closure passed local execution on 2026-06-04: user/admin CSS now has explicit phone/tablet responsive blocks, safe-area padding, 44px touch-target policy, bounded scroll, no-horizontal-scroll/no-overlap wrapping guards, and tablet density rules; user/admin layouts expose Phase-61 static proof markers; admin Analytics and Servers gained root min-width containment; frontend/admin builds, Phase-61 smoke, post-commit Phase-60 QA regression, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

Phase-62 compactness/deletion audit passed local execution on 2026-06-04: user dashboard/config/subscription/public secondary copy and admin MTProto/server secondary details are folded into compact panels, primary VPN/subscription/MTProto/auth/admin workflows remain visible, Phase-62 smoke and Phase-57/56/61/60/58/54 regressions passed, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/install guard stayed clean.

Phase-63 visible logo integration passed local execution on 2026-06-04: the prepared 96x96 KrotPN PNG is used as a bounded visible mark in public/auth screens, protected user shell, admin login, admin rail, and admin topbar; existing email-logo/BIMI/provider-avatar boundaries remain unchanged; user/admin builds, Phase-63 smoke, Phase-55/56/57/58/60/61/62 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

Phase-64 premium Resend email templates passed local execution on 2026-06-04: verification and password-reset emails now share a compact premium Matrix-safe shell with public /brand/email-logo.png body logo, email-client-safe table/inline styling, clear CTA, image-blocking-safe fallback panel, clean text fallback, token-safe Phase-64 markers, backend email tests 5/5, Phase-64 smoke, Phase-51 brand regression, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/provider/runtime/frontend guard passed.

Phase-65 premium release-candidate gate passed local execution on 2026-06-04: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed, backend premium email tests passed 5/5, Phase-55 through Phase-64 premium smokes passed, Phase-65 RC smoke recorded release notes and clean-deploy gaps, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected source/deploy/provider/runtime guard passed. No release tag, GitHub push, deploy, or stable promotion was performed.

Stable release v2.25.0-matrix-ui-stable was prepared on 2026-06-04 after an explicit operator release request: frontend and frontend-admin production builds, backend premium email tests 5/5, Phase-55 through Phase-65 premium smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected source/deploy/provider/runtime gates passed locally before GitHub push.

Phase-66 minimal Resend email template polish passed local execution on 2026-06-04: verification and password-reset emails now use a larger 128px public body logo, remove the operator-requested Matrix/access/intro/support/footer copy, remove the #5cf2c8 top strip and #04090d outer wrapper background, preserve the dark card, CTA button, fallback action URL, clean text fallback, token redaction, and protected deploy/provider/runtime surfaces; backend email tests, Phase-64/Phase-51/Phase-66 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected guard passed.

Phase-67 public splash and auth polish passed local execution on 2026-06-04: / is now a splash-only KrotPN logo route with bounded redirect to /login, login/register/forgot/reset pages use frameless Matrix auth forms with requested Russian copy and red-focus inputs, MatrixBackground supports legacy matchMedia and static fallback, browser screenshots were captured for mobile/desktop/reduced-motion auth routes, frontend/admin builds and Phase-44/46/52/55/56/59/60/61/62/63 regressions passed, and protected backend/deploy/runtime surfaces were untouched.

Stable release v2.26.0-auth-splash-stable was prepared on 2026-06-04 after an explicit operator release request: Phase-66/67 local verification, frontend and frontend-admin production builds, backend email tests 5/5, Phase-44/46/51/52/55/56/59/60/61/62/63/64/66/67 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, protected backend/deploy/provider/runtime guards, and release metadata checks passed before GitHub push.

Post-v2.26 Matrix rain reliability hotfix passed locally on 2026-06-04 after live deploy feedback: user/admin MatrixBackground now uses visualViewport-aware 128px mobile overscan and immediate nonblank frame seeding, VisualShell mounts a CSS rain fallback and keeps route transforms off the root fixed-background shell, user/admin CSS covers 100dvh+128px, frontend/admin builds plus Phase-52/59/61/67/60 smokes passed, and Chrome 390x844 screenshots confirm no bottom black cutoff.

Auth/session follow-up on 2026-06-04 is implemented locally: /verify-email now uses the same frameless Matrix auth style as Phase-67 pages, /login resumes an existing valid user session in a new tab and redirects to /dashboard, browser session storage has a 60-day idle TTL, and backend/deploy defaults now write REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS=60 so clean deploy matches the frontend policy.

Admin login follow-up on 2026-06-04 is implemented locally: https://krotpn.xyz:8443/login is reduced to a large unframed logo, email/password inputs, error state, and Войти button while preserving the existing admin API role gate and avoiding stale default credentials or helper copy.

Phase-68 user dashboard subscription merge passed local execution on 2026-06-04: /dashboard is now the compact MTProto-first cabinet, subscription/tariffs/calendar render directly below through shared SubscriptionPanel, /dashboard/subscription remains route-compatible, user shell logo is frameless, visible config raw/diagnostics panels are removed, and Phase-68/45/46/50/53/57/58/60/61/62/63/67 gates passed with protected backend/deploy/runtime guards clean.

Phase-69 referral bonus activation correctness passed local execution on 2026-06-04: paid referrals now grant exactly one 7-day inviter reward, active inviter subscriptions extend from the correct base, inviters without active access receive pending first-VPN referral bonus access, duplicate processing is idempotent, pending bonus days transfer safely into paid subscriptions, and recent invite rows show masked referred identity instead of "Реферал #N"; backend tests, frontend build, Phase-69 smoke, XML/MyGRACE/diff gates, and protected deploy/runtime guards passed.

Phase-70 VPN QR parity and config page compaction passed local execution on 2026-06-04: /vpn/config JSON, /vpn/config/download bytes, and backend QR payload source now prove exact config parity, frontend and backend QR rendering use lighter level-M settings without changing config content, /dashboard/config stays free of raw-config/diagnostics panels, Phase-48 .conf MIME headers remain intact, deploy/create-client.sh remains untouched, and backend/frontend/MyGRACE/protected-surface gates passed.

Stable release v2.27.0-user-cabinet-qr-stable was prepared on 2026-06-04 after an explicit operator release request: Phase-68/69/70 local verification, backend VPN/referral/billing/trial/scheduler gates, frontend and frontend-admin production builds, Phase-48/57/62/68/69/70 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, protected deploy/runtime/admin guards, and release metadata checks passed before GitHub push.

Phase-71 device config retrieval API and config page master-detail UX passed local execution on 2026-06-04: backend exposes read-only selected-device config/download/QR/Amnezia QR endpoints without create/rotate/reprovision side effects, /dashboard/config now lets users select any existing active device and export QR/.conf/Copy from a compact detail surface, rotate/delete are secondary confirmation-safe actions, requested logo/calendar/copy/i18n polish is applied, backend tests passed 31/31, frontend build passed, Phase-57/59/61/62/70/71 smokes passed, XML/MyGRACE/diff gates passed, and protected deploy/runtime/admin surfaces stayed clean.

Stable release v2.28.0-device-config-master-detail-stable was prepared on 2026-06-04 after an explicit operator release request: Phase-71 local verification, backend device/vpn/trial suite, frontend and frontend-admin production builds, Phase-57/59/61/62/70/71 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, protected deploy/runtime/admin guards, and release metadata checks passed before GitHub push.

Phase-72 user auth and cabinet navigation polish passed local execution on 2026-06-05: /login invalid credentials now show "Неверный логин или пароль", Settings no longer exposes language controls, the desktop user logout is directly under Settings, the mobile cabinet has a compact bottom navigation dock, the desktop subscription calendar is denser while mobile behavior remains intact, frontend/admin builds and Phase-57/59/61/68/71/72/session smokes passed, and protected backend/admin/deploy/runtime surfaces stayed clean.

Phase-73 user config page and Amnezia QR correctness passed local execution on 2026-06-05: /dashboard/config now uses "KPN Конфигурация", removes the selected-device helper sentence, shows "Новый конфиг для вашего устройства", preserves selected-device AmneziaWG QR/.conf/Copy, no longer advertises unsupported AmneziaVPN QR, guides AmneziaVPN users to .conf import, shows tariff-aware device-limit exhaustion copy, and keeps backend/billing/VPN/deploy/runtime/admin surfaces unchanged.

Phase-74 admin shell navigation, login, and scroll fixes passed local execution on 2026-06-05: admin login inputs now reserve icon-safe padding, visible admin "Тарифы" navigation is removed, direct /plans redirects safely to dashboard, desktop "Выйти" sits under "Ноды", admin content owns the desktop scroll surface, the rail is bounded to 100dvh, frontend-admin build and Phase-74 smoke passed, and backend/user tariff/deploy/runtime surfaces stayed clean.

Phase-75 admin Users and Devices unified inventory passed local execution on 2026-06-05: admin /users is now the single visible account/device inventory, each user can expand bounded device rows, block/unblock/rotate/revoke remain confirmation-safe inside the user row, visible "Устройства" navigation is removed, direct /devices redirects safely to /users, frontend-admin build and Phase-75 smoke passed, and backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend surfaces stayed clean.

Phase-76 consolidated frontend polish gate passed local execution on 2026-06-05: user/admin production builds, Phase-72/73 user smokes, Phase-74/75 admin smokes, Phase-57/61/68/70/71 user regressions, Phase-54/58/59/62 admin regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard passed; backend/API targeted tests were skipped by contract because no backend or API-binding diff existed.

what-is-fragile.item: Deployment scripts and secrets handling.
Host-level VPN and routing dependencies.
Legacy VPNServer compatibility during topology migration.
Remote credentials handled through temporary operator materialization remain a deployment risk.
Verification reproducibility across environments.

MTProto public edge integration now has local/static and clean-VPS live proof through Phase-41; future shared 443/TLS/domain changes still require operator DNS, wildcard TLS, and rollback window readiness.
Phase-32 shared 443 production smoke is closed by Phase-41 clean VPS evidence; future public 443 changes still require DNS, trusted wildcard TLS material, and rollback window discipline.
Phase-35 wildcard TLS deploy path is now covered by Phase-41 clean VPS evidence; future certificate replacement remains operator-sensitive.
Phase-36 Resend delivery is operator-confirmed for registration on clean deploy; future risk is Resend free-tier limits, sender/domain verification drift, or key rotation.

Phase-37 RU-local MTProto edge remains superseded by Phase-38/39 DE-backed edge work; use Phase-39 evidence for current Telegram availability triage instead of the earlier RU-local downstream blocker.
Phase-38 and Phase-39 stay historical partial-live phases because their original acceptance gates were superseded; Phase-41 is now the production MTProto closure path.

Phase-40 is partial-live and superseded by Phase-41: clean deploy, official runtime health, secret sync, unchanged-manifest stability, private stats, and DE NAT info were proven on VPS, but official MTProxy does not match the required per-user SNI/no-restart product model.

Phase-41 is passed-live: KrotPN provisioning returns ee fake-TLS links and live diagnostics prove policy replay, RU SNI routing, fake-TLS accept, valid non-empty proxy ad tag, issued-link mtp_ping req_pq success, and operator-confirmed Telegram Desktop/mobile connectivity after clean deploy.

Phase-42 analytics/promotion tag are passed-live for the promotion tag path: active connections, handshakes, closes, protocol errors, req_pq hints, and global bytes are wired from the live runtime; exact per-user byte attribution under concurrent active SNI domains remains a future data-plane-hook limitation.

Phase-43 analytics are partially passed-live: raw IP data is encrypted and admin-only with 90-day retention, and the clean-deploy validation confirmed real client IP visibility for MTProto users. Resource-metric tuning, graph polish, and TTL IP block runtime enforcement remain future hardening items.

Phase-45 is passed-local for 4-day pending VPN trial activation on first successful VPN handshake, idempotency, no paid-subscription regression, days/hours/minutes countdown, and subscription calendar UX without deploy/install changes; live clean-deploy validation remains optional before release promotion.

Phase-47 is passed-local-hotfix for CTA MTProto SNI/link generation and RU SNI router compatibility; live clean-deploy Telegram proof for a CTA-issued hostname is the next operator validation before stable promotion.

Phase-48 is passed-local for deterministic HTTP/header and frontend Blob behavior; optional live validation remains manual Android Chrome/iOS Safari proof that downloaded files stay as .conf on real devices.

Phase-49 is passed-local for BIMI asset delivery and DNS runbook; live curl, default._bimi DNS propagation, and mailbox avatar rendering remain operator/provider-side validation after release deployment.

Phase-50 is passed-local for tariff catalog, checkout, YooKassa payload shape, device-limit guard, UI/API contract, and protected-surface isolation; optional live validation remains clean-deploy review of the three tariffs plus a real or YooKassa test-mode payment.

Phase-51 is passed-local for favicon/PWA asset delivery and Resend HTML email-logo rendering; optional live validation remains curl/browser proof for https://krotpn.xyz/favicon.ico and https://krotpn.xyz/brand/email-logo.png plus a real delivered Resend email with remote images enabled.

Phase-52 is passed-local for the shared Matrix visual foundation on login shells, Phase-53 is passed-local for the user cabinet Matrix redesign, and Phase-54 is passed-local for the admin console Matrix redesign with compact route/static smoke evidence.

Phase-53 is passed-local for the user cabinet Matrix redesign: compact auth screens, protected user Layout, dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, settings, Loading state, MTProto card, trial/calendar, and tariff surfaces are retuned with frontend build, Phase-53 smoke, production-preview screenshots, reduced-motion proof, and protected deploy/install isolation.

Phase-54 is passed-local for the admin console Matrix redesign: admin login, layout, dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, MTProto analytics, servers, plans, analytics, StatCard, and shared admin CSS are retuned into compact Matrix operator surfaces; frontend-admin build, Phase-54 static smoke, MTProto redaction/confirmation markers, canonical Plans guard, reduced-motion markers, and protected deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/runtime isolation passed on 2026-06-03. Authenticated protected-route screenshot review remains clean-deploy follow-up.

Phase-55, Phase-56, Phase-57, Phase-58, Phase-59, Phase-60, Phase-61, Phase-62, Phase-63, Phase-64, Phase-65, Phase-68, Phase-69, Phase-70, Phase-71, Phase-72, Phase-73, Phase-74, Phase-75, and Phase-76 are passed-local for premium art-direction tokens, public landing/auth route polish, protected user cabinet command surfaces, premium admin cockpit surfaces, Matrix motion/microinteraction polish, repeatable premium QA gates, phone/tablet adaptation closure, compactness/deletion audit, visible logo integration, premium transactional email templates, the local premium release-candidate gate, compact dashboard-owned subscription merge, referral bonus correctness, QR/config parity, selected-device config retrieval UX, user auth localization, Russian-only Settings, mobile cabinet dock, desktop logout placement, compact desktop subscription calendar, truthful AmneziaVPN .conf guidance on /dashboard/config, admin shell Tariffs removal/logout/scroll fixes, unified admin Users/Devices inventory, and consolidated Phase-72 through Phase-75 frontend polish verification. Authenticated protected-route screenshots, real delivered Resend email rendering, real YooKassa/live referral payment proof, and real-device multi-device/config/navigation review remain clean-deploy follow-up.
Emergency relocation is documented but still blocked until a trusted backup bundle and isolated restore target exist for dry-run evidence.
Cookie-only auth migration is planned but not executed because it requires explicit approval and HTTPS or production-like smoke evidence.

User auth remains rollback-compatible localStorage token storage, now with a 60-day inactivity timestamp and server refresh lifetime alignment; cookie-only migration is still a separate approved-live hardening step.

gate.summary: Local routing-focused backend verification and admin frontend build pass.
Live RU and DE hosts validated with ipset, awg, awg-quick, container startup, HTTPS surfaces and tunnel connectivity after deploy-script hotfixes.
Admin UI treats route policy as the preferred control surface, and live rollout evidence now exists for the host-managed routing path.
Deploy-time AWG stealth obfuscation validated on live RU/DE VPS from GitHub main; CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE parity, handshakes, client egress and non-rotation upgrade preservation passed.
Local target verification passed: anti-abuse classifier, handshake monitor integration, scheduler interval, cooldown enforcement, audit events and admin anti-abuse context.
Local target verification passed and operator-confirmed VPS deployment test passed for release v2.13.0-vpn-network-capacity-stable on 2026-04-20.
Runbooks and backup manifest contract exist, but restore dry-run requires a trusted backup bundle and isolated restore target.
User mobile UI local build and viewport smoke passed on 2026-05-10.
Admin mobile UI local build, viewport smoke, and device confirmation guard passed on 2026-05-10.
Session security static gate, admin refresh-token cleanup, and blacklist tests passed locally on 2026-05-10; cookie-only migration still requires explicit approval.
Operator handoff and verification matrix created without touching deploy/install scripts.
Operator-confirmed clean VPS deployment passed on 2026-05-12; release promoted from local-stabilization prerelease to stable.
Local Phase-27 backend tests passed for email delivery and pending verified-registration foundation; active /register remains unchanged until Phase-28.

Primary Phase-28 backend, frontend, session smoke, billing route/API, device API, VPN compatibility, referral, MTProto integration, and MyGRACE gates pass locally after stale /api test routes were aligned with /api/v1.

Local Phase-29 backend tests passed for assignment registry, migration metadata, deterministic provisioning, verified-user guard, idempotency, and reissue policy; no deploy/install scripts were changed.

Local Phase-30 backend tests passed for runtime policy apply, startup replay, degraded bridge handling, safe health summaries, scheduler reconciliation, and M-042/M-043 regression coverage; no deploy/install scripts were changed.

Local Phase-31 backend tests, frontend build, static mobile/API smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed; owner-only MTProto proxy data is now visible in the user cabinet without deploy/install changes.

Local Phase-32 static gates passed for krotpn.xyz settings, nginx redirect/fallback contract, compose config, cutover runbook, and protected deploy/install guard; Phase-41 clean VPS evidence closes live DNS/TLS/MTProto shared 443 smoke.

Local Phase-33 backend tests, frontend-admin build, static smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed; admins can inspect redacted MTProto state and run confirmation-safe reissue/revoke with runtime SNI policy removal and without deploy/install changes.

Local Phase-34 backend integration, frontend/admin static smoke, backup/restore docs coverage, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed; Phase-41 clean VPS evidence closes live krotpn.xyz DNS/TLS/shared-443/Telegram client smoke.
Local Phase-35 shell syntax/static gates passed and Phase-41 clean VPS evidence confirms the operator-provided wildcard TLS path works for production HTTPS and MTProto edge.

Local execution passed for Resend installer/deploy env wiring, backend Settings acceptance, request-shape coverage, provider_disabled regression guards, and redaction; clean VPS registration via email is operator-confirmed.
Local implementation addressed missing runtime pieces and RU Telegram routes, but the RU-local runtime path was superseded by Phase-38/41 DE-backed SNI routing and KPprotoN pass-live proof.

Live RU/DE edge proof passed for public HTTPS, admin 8443, DE listener 443, private policy health, and HAProxy DE backend UP; final assignment replay and Telegram Desktop/mobile proof are closed by Phase-41.

Local and redacted live smoke passed for issued assignment, policy health, RU public 443, fake-TLS accept, DE fallback 9443, and Telegram downstream reachability; final client proof is closed by Phase-41.

Local Phase-40 execution passed for official MTProxy runtime scaffold, per-user dd-secret sync, redacted admin/user paths, and RU HTTPS-vs-MTProxy routing; the production path is superseded by Phase-41 KPprotoN fake-TLS.

Local execution restores KPprotoN fake-TLS SNI as the production MTProto path; live diagnostics fixed the old mtproto_proxy lock and blank ad-tag req_pq blocker, issued-link mtp_ping passes, and operator clean-deploy testing confirms Telegram Desktop/mobile proxy connectivity plus VPN.

Live RU/DE reboot diagnosis found DE awg0, RU vpnclients policy table/NAT, DE NAT, and incomplete MTProto downstream bootstrap risks; local code now guards DE awg0 boot persistence, runtime POLICY_LISTEN_IP wait, idempotent policy apply, krotpn-vpn-runtime.service route/NAT restore, complete Telegram DC fallback config, and single-message pending UI. Operator clean-deploy and reboot validation on 2026-05-24 confirmed website, admin panel, VPN, and issued KPprotoN MTProto proxies recover after startup delay.

Local Phase-42 execution passed for metadata-only MTProto analytics, runtime telemetry bridge, admin API/UI redaction, observe-only abuse signals, and safe @MTProxyBot promotion tag control; operator clean-deploy validation on 2026-05-23 confirmed promo tag registration/application with applied state.

Local Phase-43 execution passed for compact admin analytics UX, encrypted 90-day admin-only IP observability, alert inbox/actions with Russian hover help, hidden visible Signals noise, storage retention jobs, backend/API/UI regressions, Erlang compile, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and static redaction smoke; live deployment validation remains the next evidence step.

Local execution passed for branded verification/reset emails, spam-folder guidance, strong-password enforcement, password reset, duplicate-email recovery CTA, required log markers, redaction, migration metadata, frontend build, and no deploy/install changes.

Local execution passed for 4-day pending trial activation by first successful VPN handshake, first-config access, paid/active subscription non-regression, server-time countdown, calendar UX, required log markers, redaction, migration metadata, backend regression suite, frontend build, UX smoke, and no deploy/install changes.

Local execution passed for password format example UX, MTProto tg:// app link vs https://t.me browser link split, Russian proxy labels, bounded status refresh, Phase-46 static smoke, frontend build, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and no deploy/install changes.

Local execution and hotfixes passed for CTA prefix allow-list, 4-hex public short IDs for new assignments, one-label wildcard-safe SNI, final-SNI fake-TLS secret binding, legacy u-* and existing 7-hex CTA assignment preservation, owner tg:// and https://t.me link consistency, RU SNI router 4/7-hex CTA ACL compatibility, redaction, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, frontend build, Phase-38/41/47 smoke, targeted backend tests, and protected install/deploy-script/nginx/docker-compose topology guard.

Local execution passed for application/octet-stream attachment downloads, Content-Disposition filename and filename-star .conf metadata, nosniff/no-store headers, safe filename sanitation, body preservation, auth compatibility, frontend Blob MIME, redaction, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, backend tests 10/10, frontend build, Phase-48 static smoke, and protected deploy/install diff guard.

Local execution passed for BIMI Tiny P/S SVG normalization, frontend public asset delivery, frontend nginx /.well-known/bimi allow-rule before hidden-file deny, README DNS instructions, frontend build dist-copy proof, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, Phase-49 smoke, and protected deploy/install diff guard.

Local execution passed for canonical KrotPN 1/6/9 tariff convergence, server-derived YooKassa amount/metadata, pre-payment downgrade guard, paid webhook pending-trial cancellation, device-limit enforcement for 1/6/9, compact user/admin tariff UI, backend tests 29/29, frontend/admin builds, Phase-50 smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install diff guard.

Local execution passed for user/admin favicon assets, user PWA icons, public /brand/email-logo.png, Resend verification/reset HTML logo rendering from FRONTEND_URL, backend email tests 5/5, frontend/admin builds, Phase-51 source and dist smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install diff guard.

Local execution passed for shared user/admin MatrixBackground and VisualShell, Matrix palette tokens, CRT scanlines, vignette layering, focus-visible and reduced-motion policies, Phase-52 static smoke, user/admin builds, Chrome screenshots at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, reduced-motion 390x844, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install guard.

Local execution passed for compact Matrix user auth and cabinet routes, removed heavy login hero, preserved auth/VPN/MTProto/trial/tariff/config-download contracts, added scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs, passed frontend build and smoke, captured production-preview mobile/desktop/reduced-motion screenshots with virtual-time-budget, and kept install.sh/deploy/nginx/docker-compose/runtime surfaces untouched.

Local execution passed for compact Matrix admin login/layout/dashboard/users/devices/MTProto/servers/plans/analytics routes, scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs, frontend-admin build, MTProto redaction/confirmation gates, canonical Plans no-CRUD guard, reduced-motion/pointer-safe markers, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/runtime isolation; authenticated protected-route screenshot review remains clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for premium user/admin CSS art-direction tokens, balanced palette, compact type/density/logo rules, non-orb shell backgrounds, Phase-55 smoke with screenshot artifact validation, frontend/admin builds, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install guard.

Local execution passed for public / landing, protected /dashboard route split with legacy redirects, visible logo auth screens, verified-email safety copy, canonical tariff preview, Phase-56 public/auth smoke, Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regressions, frontend build, Chrome screenshot matrix, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install guard.

Local execution passed for protected user command center, direct /dashboard/* primary actions, compact VPN/subscription/MTProto/device first-screen strip, config QR/download/copy/device workflow, subscription countdown/calendar/tariff CTA guard, compact referrals/settings, Phase-57 smoke, Phase-45/46/48/50/52/53/55/56 regressions, frontend build, static-route screenshot proof marker, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for premium admin command center, compact route shell, dashboard actions, bounded users/devices/MTProto/server inventories, MTProto redaction, confirmation guards, canonical tariff readonly guard, analytics/runtime readonly frames, Phase-58 smoke, Phase-42/43/50/52/54/55 regressions, frontend-admin build, static-route screenshot proof marker, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/frontend-user guard; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for Phase-59 motion budget tokens, route entrance transitions, copy/download/proxy feedback, admin feedback/status transitions, reduced-motion fallback, pointer-scroll/focus/inactive-tab safety markers, Phase-59 smoke, Phase-52/55/56/57 regressions, user/admin builds, git diff --check, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, protected backend/deploy/runtime guard, and post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke.

Local execution passed for the unified premium frontend QA gate: Phase-60 smoke, frontend/admin builds, route/viewport static proof, reduced-motion/accessibility/no-overlap gates, bundle budgets, Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.

Local execution passed for phone/tablet responsive closure: user/admin builds, Phase-61 smoke with phone/tablet/desktop/reduced-motion matrix, safe-area, touch-target, bounded-scroll, no-horizontal-scroll/no-overlap markers, post-commit Phase-60 regression smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for frontend/admin compactness and deletion audit: Phase-62 smoke, user/admin builds, Phase-57/56/61/60/58/54 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/install guard passed; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for visible logo integration: prepared 96x96 logo asset audit, user/admin BrandMark components, public/auth/user/admin placement markers, user/admin builds, Phase-63 smoke, Phase-55/56/57/58/60/61/62 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed; live browser visual review remains clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for compact user dashboard merge: shared SubscriptionPanel, MTProto-first /dashboard, route-compatible /dashboard/subscription wrapper, frameless user-shell logo, removed visible config raw/diagnostics panels, user/admin builds, Phase-68/45/46/50/53/57/58/60/61/62/63/67 smokes, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guards.

Local execution passed for referral bonus correctness: backend referral/billing/trial/scheduler tests passed 34/34, frontend build passed, Phase-69 smoke passed, XML parse/MyGRACE lint/git diff checks passed, and protected deploy/install/runtime/admin surfaces stayed clean.

Local execution passed for VPN QR parity and config page compaction: backend VPN/router/manual-client tests passed, frontend build passed, Phase-48/57/62/70 smokes passed, QR payload source matches config/download payloads, QR rendering uses lighter level-M settings, config raw/diagnostics blocks stay absent, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks passed, and protected deploy/install/runtime/admin surfaces stayed clean.

Stable release target includes Phase-68 through Phase-70 local verification: compact user dashboard subscription merge, referral bonus correctness, QR/config parity, frontend/admin production builds, backend targeted suites, Phase-48/57/62/68/69/70 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime/admin guards. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

Stable release target includes Phase-71 local verification: selected-device read-only config/download/QR/Amnezia QR API, compact master-detail /dashboard/config UX, secondary confirmation-safe rotate/delete controls, requested logo/calendar/copy/i18n polish, backend device/vpn/trial suite, frontend/admin production builds, Phase-57/59/61/62/70/71 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime/admin guards. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

Local execution passed for Phase-72: Russian invalid-login error, Russian-only Settings without language controls, desktop logout directly under Settings, compact mobile bottom cabinet navigation, smaller desktop subscription calendar, frontend/admin builds, Phase-57/59/61/68/71/72/session smokes, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected backend/admin/deploy/runtime guard. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

Local execution passed for Phase-73: /dashboard/config KPN copy, removed selected-device helper sentence, selected-device AmneziaWG QR preserved, unsupported AmneziaVPN QR advertising removed, AmneziaVPN .conf import guidance added, tariff-aware device-limit copy added, frontend build and Phase-48/57/61/70/71/73 smokes passed, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks passed, and protected backend/admin/deploy/runtime guard stayed clean.

Local execution passed for Phase-74: admin login icon padding fixed, visible admin Tariffs nav removed, direct /plans redirects safely, desktop Logout sits under Nodes, admin content scroll and bounded rail markers are present, frontend-admin build and Phase-74 smoke passed, and protected backend/user tariff/deploy/runtime surfaces stayed clean.

Local execution passed for Phase-75: admin /users became the single visible account/device inventory, visible Devices nav was removed, direct /devices redirects safely to /users, expanded user rows expose bounded device lists and confirmation-safe block/unblock/rotate/revoke controls, frontend-admin build and Phase-75 smoke passed, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend guard stayed clean.

Local execution passed for premium Resend email templates: verification/reset templates share a compact Matrix-safe email shell, public email-logo body image, CTA, image-blocking-safe fallback panel, clean text fallback, Phase-64 redaction/brand markers, backend email tests 5/5, Phase-64 smoke, Phase-51 brand regression, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/provider/runtime/frontend guard; live delivered-email rendering remains clean-deploy follow-up.

Local execution passed for the premium release-candidate gate: user/admin builds, backend premium email tests 5/5, Phase-55 through Phase-64 premium smokes, Phase-65 RC smoke, release notes, screenshot/static evidence matrix, live-gap manifest, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected source/deploy/provider/runtime guard passed; no release tag, GitHub push, deploy, or stable promotion was performed.

Stable release target includes Phase-52 through Phase-65 local verification: user/admin production builds, backend premium email tests 5/5, Phase-55 through Phase-65 premium smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, protected source/deploy/provider/runtime guards, and refreshed MyGRACE graph index. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

Stable release target includes Phase-66 and Phase-67 local verification: minimal Resend email templates, splash-only public / redirect, frameless auth screens, red-focus auth fields, MatrixBackground browser fallback guards, browser screenshots, user/admin production builds, backend email tests 5/5, regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/provider/runtime guards. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

Stable release target includes Phase-44 through Phase-51 local verification: backend email, trial, tariff, billing, device, VPN compatibility, DB migration, MTProto provisioning, frontend/admin builds, Phase-45/46/47/48/49/50/51 smoke gates, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install guards. Operator clean-deploy validation remains the next live evidence step after GitHub push.

immediate-priorities.priority: Run clean-deploy validation for the next GitHub main build after Phase-72: public / splash redirect, login invalid-password Russian error, login/register/forgot/reset auth pages on phone/tablet/desktop, delivered Resend verification/reset email rendering with remote images disabled/enabled, verified registration, compact dashboard MTProto/subscription view, mobile bottom cabinet navigation, compact desktop subscription calendar, referral bonus behavior, selected-device QR/.conf/Copy workflow for multiple devices, admin panel login, VPN connectivity, and issued KPprotoN MTProto proxy connectivity.
Run clean-deploy validation for the current stable baseline with review of three tariffs, favicon delivery, BIMI asset URL, and a real or YooKassa test-mode payment when credentials are available.
Continue Phase-43 admin analytics hardening with real redacted runtime data: graph refresh polish, resource metrics, alert notifications, and TTL IP block runtime enforcement.
Run Phase-22 non-production restore rehearsal with a trusted backup bundle and isolated restore target before production release.
Decide whether to approve cookie-only auth migration and provide HTTPS or production-like auth smoke target.

known-risks.risk: Weak/default admin credentials in deployment scripts.
Remote credentials handled through sshpass/base64 temporary materialization.
Tokens stored in localStorage in frontends.
Runtime DB compatibility migrations instead of disciplined migration workflow.
Strong dependence on host filesystem and host tools for VPN behavior.
Disaster recovery cannot be considered incident-ready until live or non-production restore rehearsal evidence exists.
MTProto production availability is now operator-confirmed after Phase-41, but future runtime/deploy changes must preserve issued-link mtp_ping plus Telegram Desktop/mobile proof before release.

handoff-instructions.step: Read docs/graph-index.xml second and then only the relevant docs/modules/M-XXX.xml files.
Read docs/plan-index.xml and then only the relevant docs/plans/Phase-N.xml files.
Read docs/verification-index.xml and then only the relevant docs/verification/V-M-XXX.xml files.
Only then inspect the code of the module you are changing.
After completing work, update the relevant MyGRACE docs if system behavior, priorities or verification changed.
